title: Admin and Public User Two-End Implementation
objective: 完成用户端与本地管理端的核心功能开发，使用户端只消费公开投影，管理端负责源内容预览、白名单勾选、发布队列、质量门禁、图谱分类与未来 3D/Agent 能力的产品承载位

tasks.title: Implement public library and note detail pages
acceptance_criteria: Public library only renders content allowed by the publish manifest
Note detail pages support Markdown body, source metadata, tags and related navigation
Private or unapproved source records cannot be reached through public routes
tasks.notes: User-facing content is public projection only.

tasks.title: Implement portfolio and timeline pages
acceptance_criteria: Projects, decks, resume events and selected notes can be browsed chronologically
Portfolio cards expose public evidence, skills and project metadata without private leakage
Timeline supports future filtering by type and tag
tasks.notes: This should feel like a knowledge work portfolio, not a generic blog archive.

tasks.title: Upgrade public graph explorer and 3D entry point
acceptance_criteria: Graph explorer supports search, filtering, cluster legend and readable node inspection
Large graph data remains responsive on desktop and usable on mobile
Only public projection nodes are rendered in the public graph
A gated 3D graph entry point and interaction contract are documented for S14 rather than treated as out of scope
tasks.notes: S09 establishes the product surface; full Three.js/WebGPU/gesture implementation is scheduled for S14.

tasks.title: Implement clustering and taxonomy surfaces
acceptance_criteria: Library and graph surfaces expose stable clusters, tags, source folders and content types
Cluster labels are human-readable and can later be enriched by embeddings or LLM summaries
Admin and public views can distinguish structural taxonomy from semantic clusters
tasks.notes: This is deterministic taxonomy first; embedding-assisted clustering is scheduled for S14.

tasks.title: Implement admin source browser
acceptance_criteria: Admin can browse source tree records from the local API or generated manifest
Admin displays status, tags, source path and public eligibility indicators
Admin surface is clearly local-first and not linked from public navigation
tasks.notes: Avoid exposing admin routes in production without an explicit decision.

tasks.title: Implement admin preview and whitelist workflow
acceptance_criteria: Admin can preview a source item and mark it draft, review or publishable in the manifest
Manifest changes are explicit local writes and do not publish remotely
Quality checklist state can be represented before publication
tasks.notes: Actual Git commits remain manual unless requested.

tasks.title: Integrate admin build and verify panel
acceptance_criteria: Admin shows build, verify and preview commands with current local status
No one-click public deploy is added
Failures surface actionable diagnostics for the human maintainer
tasks.notes: Command execution from UI should be designed carefully and may remain documented-only if risk is high.
